programme.title: Darcy Malone & The Tangle
programme.desc: Americana band hailing from New Orleans, known for their fusion of indie rock, country, and soul influences.

programme.title: Moonchild - Live at Moods
programme.desc: Moonchild's formula is there for everyone to see: soulful tones to color intriguing and relatable lyrics.

programme.title: Darcy Malone & The Tangle
programme.desc: Americana band hailing from New Orleans, known for their fusion of indie rock, country, and soul influences.

programme.title: Moonchild - Live at Moods
programme.desc: Moonchild's formula is there for everyone to see: soulful tones to color intriguing and relatable lyrics.

programme.title: Chillin' with Qwest TV
programme.desc: Enjoy our chillin' playlist cooked with love and get your day off to a good start with Qwest TV!

programme.title: Diverse, Beautiful Music by Qwest TV
programme.desc: Qwest TV breaks down the barriers between the worldâ€™s best, diverse sounds that will move you!

programme.title: Where Great Music Meets by Qwest TV
programme.desc: A curated selection of concerts from all around the globe that pushes boundaries and soothes your soul!

programme.title: From Be Bop to Hip Hop by Qwest TV
programme.desc: Discover new tracks and timeless standards: "From Bebop to Doo-Wop to Hip Hop" as Quincy Jones loves to say!

programme.title: Itâ€™s Showtime! by Qwest TV
programme.desc: This is your front-row seat for tonight's concert on Qwest TV!

programme.title: Itâ€™s Showtime! by Qwest TV

programme.title: Dianne Reeves
programme.desc: Each note of Dianne Reeves sparks a journey through samba, jazz, and vibrant improvisations.

programme.title: Andrea Motis Quintet - Moods
programme.desc: Brought on stage by Quincy Jones, trumpet player, singer and composer demonstrates her elegance and simplicity

programme.title: Lusaint
programme.desc: The British singer electrifies Vienna with her warm, soulful voice, blending retro-soul, jazz, and ballads.

programme.title: Quincy Jones, A Musical Celebration
programme.desc: Marcus Miller, Richard Bona, Jules Buckley, Selah Sue, Ibrahim Maalouf: an all-star line up for a unique show!

programme.title: Maya Kamaty - Live at Moods
programme.desc: Maya Kamaty already has two albums in the bag and is relentlessly pushing the boundaries.

programme.title: Maya Kamaty - Live at Moods
programme.desc: Maya Kamaty already has two albums in the bag and is relentlessly pushing the boundaries.

Rogue Fire | Hybrid DJ Set at Naada 3.0 | Lisbon (Portugal)
programme.desc: Rogue Fire blends classical training with electronic mastery, creating a unique signature sound where saxophone meets synthesizer.

programme.title: Claptone | Pacha On Air - Bavarian State Opera | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Imagine youÂ´re taking a walk on a quiet Saturday evening in late Munich Summer, enjoying the peace and beauty of your city. And suddenly Claptone appears.

programme.title: Away To: Desert Oasis with Ziad Ghosn - By Late Knights & Creative State | Dubai (UAE)
programme.desc: Ziad Ghosn takes over the desert and its heat. Best known for his story telling long emotional sets, flawless sensual trips, and deep meaningful journeys from the very first opening track till the very orgasmic last.

programme.title: Tenishia | Chasing Sunsets - Fireworks Edition | Fort St. Angelo (Malta)
programme.desc: Prepare for a sound and light spectacle with Tenishia at â€˜Chasing Sunsets - Fireworks Editionâ€™ held at the iconic Fort St. Angelo in Malta.

programme.title: Steve Angello | Alfa Future People | Russia
programme.desc: At Alfa Future People Festival, Steve Angello showcased his signature sound of progressive house beats.

programme.title: Seth Troxler | Visionquest at Time Warp | Mannheim (Germany)
programme.desc: Seth Troxler starts off with a deep, dark, and freaky soundscape as the 'Visionquest 13' tour sets down in Mannheim and takes over area 4 of Time Warp.

programme.title: Hernan Cattaneo b2b Nick Warren | Loveland Festival 2023 Part 2 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Experience the celestial synergy of Hernan Cattaneo and Nick Warren in Part 2 of Loveland Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Wildstylez, Bass Modulators, Coone, Isaac, Pavo, Luna and more | Defqon 1 Dragonblood | Netherlands
programme.desc: A powerhouse lineup featuring Wildstylez, Bass Modulators, Coone, Isaac, Pavo, Luna, and more unleashes pure hardstyle energy at Defqon.1 Dragonblood in the Netherlands. Explosive sets, epic visuals, and the raw spirit of the Q-dance nation collide in this unforgettable celebration of harder styles.

programme.title: Lost Frequencies | Armada Invites | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Lost Frequencies steps into the spotlight at Armada Invites in Amsterdam with a feel-good set full of uplifting anthems and chart-topping hits. In the intimate setting of Armada Musicâ€™s HQ, he blends smooth grooves, infectious rhythms, and vibrant energyâ€”showcasing the signature sound thatâ€™s made him a global favorite.

programme.title: Chus | Lost In Hills | Plovdiv (Bulgaria)
programme.desc: Embark on a musical journey like no other with DJ Chus live at Lost In Hills. Immerse yourself in the enchanting landscapes of Plovdiv, Bulgaria, as DJ Chus takes you on a captivating sonic adventure.

programme.title: Nervo | Hydeout: The Prelude | Netherlands
programme.desc: NERVO turned up the heat at Hydeout: The Prelude in the Netherlands with a high-energy set packed with vibrant vocals, festival anthems, and unstoppable party vibes. The dynamic duo brought their signature mix of pop-infused EDM and infectious charisma to the virtual stage, making it a standout moment in the Hydeout series.

programme.title: Stephan Jolk | Duomo di Milano Cathedral | Italy
programme.desc: A stunning melodic journey at sunset. Recorded from the piazza where stands the magnificent Duomo cathedral, a symbol of Milan.

programme.title: Saeed Younan | Splashy Sundays at Ven Hotel | Washington D.C. (USA)
programme.desc: Dive into the vibrant beats of Saeed Younan at Splashy Sundays hosted at the Ven Hotel in Washington D.C., USA.

programme.title: Mahony | UNTOLD Festival 2023 | Cluj-Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: Dive into the beats with Mahony at UNTOLD Festival 2023 in Cluj-Napoca, Romania. Experience the magic of music in the heart of Romania. Don't miss out on this unforgettable moment!

programme.title: Monika Kruse | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Dangerous dancefloor - Don't get stepped on by the dino!

programme.title: Robert Babicz | Chasing Sunsets at Popeye Village | Malta
programme.desc: Robert Babicz brought his signature blend of deep, emotive electronic music to Chasing Sunsets at Popeye Village in Malta.

programme.title: Dam Swindle | Audio Obscura x Revere Series | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Detroit Swindle (now known as Dam Swindle) takes over the historic Het Scheepvaartmuseum in Amsterdam with two hours of pure house mastery. As part of Audio Obscuraâ€™s Revere Series, this performance blends deep grooves with a stunning heritage backdrop, capturing the true spirit of cutting-edge electronic music in iconic Dutch locations.

programme.title: Markantonio b2b Luigi Madonna | Welcome to the Future | Netherlands
programme.desc: Welcome to the Future 2017 was for sure something special! When Techno heavyweights Markantonio & Luigi Madonna stepped behind the decks, the Techno Area was on fire. Enjoy their massive b2b set and get ready to have a blast!

programme.title: Lexer | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Originating from Leipzig, the young DJ and producer Lexer gives melodic tech a soul that touches people. Enjoy the spectacular excursion he takes us on for the Ritter Butzke on Tour series at Friedrichstadt-Palast Berlin in Germany.

programme.title: Space Motion | Exit Festival After Party | Novi Sad (Serbia)
programme.desc: The Serbian DJ, producer and label boss Space Motion at Exit Festival After Party in Novi Sad, Serbia.

programme.title: Space Motion | Exit Festival After Party | Novi Sad (Serbia)
programme.desc: The Serbian DJ, producer and label boss Space Motion at Exit Festival After Party in Novi Sad, Serbia.

programme.title: Space Motion | Exit Festival After Party | Novi Sad (Serbia)
programme.desc: The Serbian DJ, producer and label boss Space Motion at Exit Festival After Party in Novi Sad, Serbia.

programme.title: I am Hardwell | Living The Dream - Documentary | Netherlands
programme.desc: Even more than the previous movie 'I AM Hardwell - Living the dream' will let you experience the music.

programme.title: WhoMadeWho | Nim Sound TV | Relevance Festival | Denmark
programme.desc: Nim Sound TV brings us the stellar performance by WhoMadeWho as they rocked the dance floor of Relevance Festival in Copenhagen.

programme.title: Hernan Cattaneo b2b Nick Warren | Loveland Festival 2023 Part 1 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Embark on a celestial musical journey with Hernan Cattaneo and Nick Warren as they join forces for a captivating b2b set at Loveland Festival 2023 Part 1 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Xenia | Radio Intense | Susqueda Basement (Spain)
programme.desc: Xenia exclusive DJ set for Radio Intense at Susqueda Basement in Spain.

programme.title: Ellen Allien | Lovefest | Serbia
programme.desc: Ellen Allien and her spaceship filled with bangers has landed at Lovefest! Energy was floating all around as this enigmatic DJ showcased to the eager Serbian crowd some proper extraterrestrial music. Tune in to her funky, acid fused performance, as she blasts the dancefloor away with some lazer tunes.

programme.title: Philipp Straub | Soho Beach DXB | Dubai (UAE)
programme.desc: We have very much enjoyed the set of Phillip Straub at Soho Beach DXB right before Carl Cox!

programme.title: Fedde Le Grand | Darklight Sessions at ADE 2022 Part 2 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Fedde Le Grand presents Darklight Sessions at Escape, Amsterdam Dance Event 2022. Enjoy part 2.

programme.title: Amiti | Tau House Guatape | Colombia
programme.desc: Beautiful melodic tech performance of Amiti at Tau House Guatape, Colombia.

programme.title: Francis Mercier | Deep Root Records 7 Year Anniversary at Nebula | New York (USA)
programme.desc: Haitian DJ producer Francis Mercier (Deep Root, Insomniac, Spinninâ€™) presents a special set for his label Deep Root Recordsâ€™ Anniversary Party at Nebula!

programme.title: Mayze x Faria | Xplaces Castelo de GuimarÃ£es | Portugal
programme.desc: After Amares and Viana do Castelo in 2020, the video project X Places will have its new edition in the cradle of the nation, in the city of GuimarÃ£es, more precisely in Castelo de GuimarÃ£es.

programme.title: Fedde Le Grand | A New Level in Dance at Ziggodome | Asmterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Fedde Le Grand redefines live electronic music with 'A New Level in Dance' at Amsterdam's iconic Ziggo Dome.

programme.title: DJ Rush | Blakksheep Showcase | ADE2015 | Dockyard Festival | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Blakksheep's showcase at Dockyard Festival was in for a perfect ending when DJ Rush stepped behind the decks. He delivered a powerful performance filled with heavy techno beats. His relentless energy spoke to his crowd, which reciprocated in ceaseless dancing and loads of hand-waving.

programme.title: Matthias Tanzmann | 11 Years of Nights.ro | Bucharest (Romania)
programme.desc: Straight from his "Moon Harbour" label night at Sonar, Matthias Tanzmann touches down in Bucharest to headline Nights.ro 11 year anniversary party. And he truly rocks it with his very own blend of groovy, funky, body moving house jams.

programme.title: Nicky Romero | Hydeout: The Prelude | Netherlands
programme.desc: Nicky Romero brings his signature energy and chart-topping anthems to Hydeout Singapore, delivering a night of electrifying beats and stunning visuals.

programme.title: Oliver Huntemann | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin ( Germany)
programme.desc: Our next excursion with Ritter Butzke is with Oliver Huntemann at Körperwelten Berlin in Germany.

programme.title: Moonbootica | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Rocking house sounds of Moonbootica for the Pacha On Air series recorded at Pacha Munich. Enjoy!

programme.title: Chrissi D. | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Enjoy the groovy and very danceable house music selection of Chrissy D. recorded in Munich for Pacha on Air series and packed with timeless classics presented on vinyl! Nobody stand still!

programme.title: Joey Daniel | Music On Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the captivating beats of Joey Daniel at Music On Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Fatima Hajji b2b Ramiro Lopez | ZOUN Live Villa`s Stream | Astun Ski Resort (Spain)
programme.desc: Fatima Hajji B2B Ramiro Lopez live from Astun Ski Resort. Huesca, Spain for Zoun LIve Villa's Stream!

programme.title: Tenishia | Chasing Sunsets x UV at Notte Bianca | Valletta Ditch (Malta)
programme.desc: Feel the mesmerizing electronic beats of Tenishia performing live at Chasing Sunsets x UV during Notte Bianca 2025 in the historic Valletta Ditch, Malta.

programme.title: David Gravell | Armada Invites | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: David Gravell takes over Armada Invites in Amsterdam. Pure trance energy, pure Amsterdam vibes. This is what happens when a Dutch legend plays at home.

programme.title: Above & Beyond | Group Therapy 300 - Warm Up set | Hong Kong
programme.desc: Above & Beyond's Warm-Up Set for Group Therapy 300 in Hong Kong set the tone for an extraordinary celebration.

programme.title: Above & Beyond | Group Therapy 300 - Warm Up set | Hong Kong
programme.desc: Above & Beyond's Warm-Up Set for Group Therapy 300 in Hong Kong set the tone for an extraordinary celebration.

programme.title: Above & Beyond | Group Therapy 300 - Warm Up set | Hong Kong
programme.desc: Above & Beyond's Warm-Up Set for Group Therapy 300 in Hong Kong set the tone for an extraordinary celebration.

programme.title: Monika Kruse | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Dangerous dancefloor - Don't get stepped on by the dino!

programme.title: Johnny Leal | Ahau Beach by Ephimera | Tulum (Mexico)
programme.desc: EphimeraÂ´s brain and director Johnny Leal playing at Ahau Tulum in front of the amazing Caribbean Sea. Enjoy our Nature, Respect.

programme.title: James Zabiela | We Love Space Closing Party | Ibiza
programme.desc: James Zabiela demonstrates both his technical mastery of machines and deep understanding of music and its effect on humans. This stunning set was recorded at the very end of Space and We Love's 2009 closing party.

programme.title: Thomas Schumacher | Ritter Butzke on Tour: Filmpark Babelsberg | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Our next excursion with Ritter Butzke is with Thomas Schumacher at the Filmpark Babelsberg Potsdam in Germany. With releases on Drumcode and Electric Ballroom and many years in the electronic music scene always pushing his boundaries, Thomas Schumacher is an integral part of the worldwide techno community.

programme.title: Dirty Doering | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Katermukke label boss Dirty Doering is the protagonist of the Ritter Butzke on Tour series at a Boat Berlin in Germany.

programme.title: Joris Voorn | Rejected Queensnight at Trouw | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Joris Voorn blows the house down with a truly epic set on Queensnight in Trouw Amsterdam, as club packed to the brim with happy people celebrates love for their Queen and electronic music. Beatrix and beats, so good together!

programme.title: Gareth Emery | Armada Invites | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Step into an unforgettable night with Gareth Emery at Armada Invites in Amsterdam.From uplifting melodies to crowd-connecting drops, itâ€™s a set that pulls you in and doesnâ€™t let go.

programme.title: Bry Ortega (live) | Opera de Arame | Brazil
programme.desc: Hop on a fast tracked techno live set.

programme.title: Tonio Barrientos | Pacha On Air | Munich (Germany)
programme.desc: Pacha On Air w Tonio Barrientos, recorded at Pacha Munich and in support of the iconic club currently closed due to the Covid Pandemic.

programme.title: Matchy | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Enjoy the progressive sounds of Matchy who takes us on an excursion through the Sauna Floor of Club Ritter Butzke.

programme.title: Above & Beyond | Group Therapy 250 - Warm Up set at The Gorge Amphitheatre | USA
programme.desc: Above & Beyond's Warm Up Set at Group Therapy 250 at The Gorge Amphitheatre, USA, set the stage for an unforgettable night of music and connection.

programme.title: Joey Daniel | Music On Festival 2023 | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the captivating beats of Joey Daniel at Music On Festival 2023 in the heart of Amsterdam, Netherlands.

programme.title: Mo Ses | Quarantine Sunrise Set | Tel Aviv (Israel)
programme.desc: The Tripping proudly present Mo Ses: Quarantine Sunrise set from the city of Tel Aviv! An hour of body moving, mind expanding music from his roof to the depths of your soul, easing you out of quarantine mode and back to life. Perfect for dancing at home, in your living room or in the bedroom.

programme.title: Colyn | Hangar Grand Place | Brussels (Belgium)
programme.desc: Hangar went live on June 10th with Colyn from the centre of the most important tourist destination in Brussels - The Grand Place - at sunrise.

programme.title: BLOND:ISH B2B YokoO | Daydreaming Experience at UNTOLD | Cluj Napoca (Romania)
programme.desc: BLONDH:ISH and YokoO return to Daydreaming Experience, this time teaming up for an ecstatic b2b set during UNTOLD 2019. There's magic in the air for this set opening (part 1 2)

programme.title: Schlepp Geist | Ritter Butzke on Tour | Berlin (Germany)
programme.desc: Schlepp Geist exclusive set for Ritter Butzke on Tour at Festung KÃ¸nigsten.

programme.title: Third Culture | HB Social Club | Oahu (Hawaii)
programme.desc: Experience the dynamic sounds of Third Culture at HB Social Club in Oahu, Hawaii.

programme.title: Adam Beyer | Loveland Festival | Amsterdam (Netherlands)
programme.desc: At Loveland Festival 2014, Drumcode label boss stepped behind the decks to close the festival with a highly energetic set to an ecstatic crowd.

programme.title: Various Artists | Ultra Music Festival 2019 | Croatia
programme.desc: Experience the sound of summer at Ultra Music Festival Europe. This video brings together standout tracks from various artists who define the energy, scale, and pulse of one of the worldâ€™s biggest electronic music festivals.

programme.title: Markantonio b2b Luigi Madonna | Welcome to the Future | Netherlands
programme.desc: Welcome to the Future 2017 was for sure something special! When Techno heavyweights Markantonio & Luigi Madonna stepped behind the decks, the Techno Area was on fire. Enjoy their massive b2b set and get ready to have a blast!

programme.title: Markantonio b2b Luigi Madonna | Welcome to the Future | Netherlands
programme.desc: Welcome to the Future 2017 was for sure something special! When Techno heavyweights Markantonio & Luigi Madonna stepped behind the decks, the Techno Area was on fire. Enjoy their massive b2b set and get ready to have a blast!
